TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Dick_Barnett, title = Dick_Barnett, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dick_Barnett} }

S.FORM: Dick Barnett nalecuhan i Gary, Indiana, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dick Barnett i 1959 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 4, namapili' tu nu Syracuse Nationals putiput. 10 bulad 2 demiad, 1936 a mihca, Dick Barnett, miunduay.
S.PHON: diʦk barnətt nar~ɾəʦuħan i garj, indiana, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. diʦk barnətt i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu sjraʦusə nationar~ɾs putiput. ** bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, diʦk barnətt, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Dick Barnett nalecuhan i Gary, Indiana, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dick Barnett i 1959 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 4, namapili' tu nu Syracuse Nationals putiput. 10 bulad 2 demiad, 1936 a mihca, Dick Barnett, miunduay.
S.PHON: diʦk barnətt nar~ɾəʦuħan i garj, indiana, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. diʦk barnətt i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu sjraʦusə nationar~ɾs putiput. ** bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, diʦk barnətt, miunduaj.
